Desserts made
like small constellations.

Layered by hand, finished with a little theatre, and baked fresh for evenings worth remembering.

Build a constellation

A gift box with no dull stars.

Pick six individual desserts. We arrange them in a keepsake box, add a handwritten card, and make you look impossibly thoughtful.

  1. 01
    Choose six

    Mix signatures, seasonal pieces and vegan options.

  2. 02
    Write a note

    Up to 180 characters, handwritten on textured paper.

  3. 03
    Pick a date

    Collect in the atelier or choose local delivery.

Our philosophy

“A dessert should be familiar enough to tempt you — and strange enough to haunt you.”
É. LunardFounder & pastry chef
2019

Classical technique. A slightly unruly imagination.

Lunaria began after midnight in a borrowed kitchen: one mixer, two trays and a stubborn idea that pastry could feel cinematic.

Today our small team still makes every mousse, biscuit, gel and glaze in-house. The menu changes with the season; the obsession with detail does not.

Meet the atelier↗

Notes from our guests

Sweet words, no bribery.

4.9★★★★★from 328 verified orders
★★★★★

“The Caramel Eclipse somehow tastes elegant and dangerous. I ordered six more before finishing the first.”

AK
Anna K.Verified buyer
★★★★★

“The box looked like jewellery and survived a 40-minute drive perfectly. The pistachio one disappeared first.”

DM
Daniel M.Verified buyer
★★★★★

“Finally, a vegan dessert that is not an apology. Citrus Orbit is bright, creamy and genuinely beautiful.”

IR
Irina R.Verified buyer

Come after the moon rises

Visit the atelier.

Watch the final glazing through the open kitchen, collect your order, or stay for an espresso and something reckless.
